home.title: Live to fight. Fight to live

accessRules.anonymous: Anonymous players can only play with bot or bot vs bot. Login is required for online mode.
accessRules.registered: Just one click to play online. Your profile, stats, and progression will be saved for future battles.

home.lore1: From this command center, every warship moves under the same pulse of orders: radar sweeps the sea again, formations are corrected, and a tactical scenario can harden into a live battlespace on a single short command.
home.lore2: Yet every coordinate on the naval chart still carries the echo of old ambushes, where a captain's composure is tested between alarm sirens and radar haze; on open water at night, only a precise order can lead to the decisive shot.
home.commandDeckDesc: Select a scenario, adjust system settings, or authenticate to unlock online operations.

gameHistory.label: Online matches
gameHistory.empty: No finished online matches yet. Win your first battle at sea.
gameHistory.loadError: Could not load match history. Try again later.

modals.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we will send password reset instructions.

features.ai: Practice mode against adaptive bot difficulty.
features.progress: Track match history and player progression.

support.label: Support the team
support.title: If you want to back the project
support.description: Your support helps the team keep polishing the experience, expanding the gameplay, and shipping stronger builds.

slides.title: {{gameName}} turns naval duels into a cinematic command room.
slides.description: This opening slide sets the tone of the product: a sci-fi battleship experience that feels immediate, sleek, and ready for live presentation.
slides.ctaHint: Scroll down to continue the showcase

panels.title: Hero Overview
panels.description: Use the first panel for a bold opening screenshot that introduces the command-deck atmosphere at a glance.
panels.frameHint: Drop in your strongest opening composition here.

panels.title: World & Tone
panels.description: This panel can focus on the visual identity of the game: radar glow, tactical glass, and oceanic sci-fi lighting.
panels.frameHint: Use a close-up that sells the universe and style.

panels.title: Why It Feels Different
panels.description: The final panel of the intro should explain why the game is exciting to watch before a single match even begins.
panels.frameHint: Use a clean shot that supports your spoken hook.

slides.title: The match flow is simple to understand and satisfying to follow.
slides.description: Use this slide to explain the experience in player language: deploy your fleet, take turns firing, read the board, and sink the opposing fleet first.

panels.title: Deploy The Fleet
panels.description: Start with a visual that shows the player preparing their side of the ocean before the first exchange begins.
panels.frameHint: Use a setup or opening battle state capture here.

panels.title: Choose The Shot
panels.description: Show how the player reads the battlefield and commits to a target in a clear, turn-based rhythm.
panels.frameHint: Pick a screenshot that communicates the moment before impact.

panels.title: Read The Result
panels.description: End with the board feedback that tells the audience whether the shot landed, missed, or changed the battle pace.
panels.frameHint: Use a frame that highlights hit and miss clarity.

slides.title: Setup and online entry feel like part of the experience, not a waiting room.
slides.description: This slide is about the journey into battle: configure the board, place ships, find a room, and move naturally into an online match.

panels.title: Configure The Match
panels.description: Use this panel to show the player shaping the battlefield before the battle narrative starts.
panels.frameHint: A fleet or board setup capture fits well here.

panels.title: Place The Fleet
panels.description: The second panel should explain the setup rhythm visually through a clear placement scene.
panels.frameHint: Use a shot of the placement phase with ship silhouettes visible.

panels.title: Find Or Join A Room
panels.description: Show the online layer from the player's perspective: getting ready, joining a room, and moving toward match start.
panels.frameHint: Choose a waiting room or room list screenshot later.

slides.title: The bot is easy to explain visually: it watches, reacts, and presses the advantage.
slides.description: Keep this part conceptual. The audience only needs to understand how the bot behaves in a match, not how it is implemented under the hood.

panels.title: Search Mode
panels.description: Use the first illustration to show the bot probing the field and building pressure before it finds anything important.
panels.frameHint: A clean board state with early bot actions works well here.

panels.title: Reaction After A Hit
panels.description: The second panel should show how the bot changes tone once it confirms a successful strike.
panels.frameHint: Use a frame where the bot has clearly locked onto a ship.

panels.title: Pressure And Finish
panels.description: Close the explanation with a visual of the bot keeping momentum and pushing toward a sink.
panels.frameHint: A later-match board state is ideal for this panel.

slides.title: Thank you to everyone who helped bring this project to life.
slides.description: This closing slide is dedicated to the people behind the game and to everyone who supported the project with feedback, time, and energy.

header.deploymentSectorConfigured: Deployment sector configured for a {{rows}} x {{cols}} grid
header.systemLogWaiting: System log: waiting for fleet confirmation

step1.configureGridHint: Configure the tactical grid before finalizing fleet composition.
step1.totalCellsInfo: Total cells occupied: {{used}} / {{max}} max (50% of board)
step1.noShips: No ships defined. Add at least one.
step1.invalidFleetError: Ships take up too many cells. Reduce sizes/counts or increase the board.

placement.cannotPlaceHere: Cannot place here: out of board or colliding with another ship.
placement.allShipsPlaced: All ships placed. You are ready to start.
placement.placementInstructions: Select a ship instance, then click a board cell to place it.
placement.randomPlacementFailed: Random placement failed. Try increasing board size or reducing fleet density.
placement.hullDeployHint: Select a hull and deploy it on the tactical grid.

header.title: Command Deck
header.description: Two active boards, a 30 second turn clock, and live fleet tracking. Red cells are confirmed hits, white cells are missed shots.
header.playerTurnHint: Choose a target on the enemy board before the timer runs out.
header.botTurnHint: The bot is selecting its next shot.
header.finished: Battle complete. You can redeploy or go back to setup.

status.label: Battle feed
status.ready: Battle stations set. Open with your first shot.
status.playerTimeout: Your turn expired. The bot takes over.
status.playerWins: Final hit landed at {{cell}}. Enemy fleet destroyed.
status.botWins: Bot's strike at {{cell}} finished your fleet.

missingState.title: No battle setup found
missingState.description: Start from setup so board size, fleet composition, and ship placements can be carried into the match.

feed.title: Fleet Community
feed.searchInputPlaceholder: Search posts by title or content…
feed.contentPlaceholder: Share your thoughts with the fleet...
feed.loginStateReady: You are connected. Publish when ready.
feed.loginStateRequired: Login is required to post, comment, and vote.
feed.empty: No posts yet. Be the first to open a thread.
feed.deletePostConfirm: This post will be removed from the forum. You cannot undo this action.

errors.TIMEOUT: Request timed out. Please try again.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
errors.spriteContextUnavailable: Could not create a 2D canvas context for sprite extraction.
errors.spriteDirectionCountInvalid: Expected 5 ship sprites for direction {{direction}}, but found {{count}}.
errors.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.USERNAME_TOO_LONG: Username must be at most 20 characters.
errors.USERNAME_INVALID_FORMAT: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and spaces.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_LONG: Password must be at most 72 characters.
errors.SIGNATURE_TOO_LONG: Signature must be at most 200 characters.
errors.SIGNATURE_INVALID_FORMAT: Signature must not contain HTML tags.
errors.FORUM_FORBIDDEN: You can only edit your own post or comment.
errors.FORUM_POST_TITLE_TOO_LONG: Post title must be at most 150 characters.
errors.FORUM_POST_CONTENT_TOO_LONG: Post content must be at most 5000 characters.
errors.FORUM_COMMENT_TOO_LONG: Comment content must be at most 1200 characters.
errors.FORUM_VOTE_INVALID: Vote must be either upvote or downvote.
errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

gameBattle.logBotAMiss: Bot A launched missile at {{coord}}... MISS!
gameBattle.logBotAFleetSunk: Bot A fleet has been sunk.
gameBattle.logBotBFleetSunk: Bot B fleet has been sunk.

result.victoryDesc: All enemy ships have been sunk. The seas are ours.
result.defeatDesc: Your fleet has been destroyed. Retreat and regroup.
